title: A Multi-Aspect LLM Review Harness for Adversarial Argument-Error Evaluation and Purpose-Annotated Failure Recycling
description: A research prototype for multi-aspect LLM review, restricted adversarial argument-error evaluation, event-contract validated provenance, explicit human gate decisions, and confirmed-failure recycling. The current release implements the system architecture but does not yet claim better evaluation performance than existing evaluation or refinement methods.
notes: Mixed-license upload: software source code is Apache-2.0; documentation and the system-design PDF are CC-BY-4.0. Add both licenses in the Zenodo record UI.
